description: Detects resource creation outside try-with-resources in Java. Simplified from Rust: flags object_creation_expression nodes inside local_variable_declaration. Cannot check the resource type against RESOURCE_TYPES list, verify try-with-resources scoping, detect factory methods, or check @SuppressWarnings("resource").

flag.message: object creation in local variable detected -- verify resource types (Connection, InputStream, etc.) are used within try-with-resources
